title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Seiun Sky...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Trainer, this is a little out of the blue, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no reason—just something to talk about.
C'mon, close your eyes and picture this.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
There's a pond in front of you. You're holding a
fishing rod in your hands...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well? Do you wanna fish now?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Perfect! Let's go do it for real, then! I'm itching to
reel in a big one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks in the direction of a claw machine
packed full of Umamusume plushies. Could it be...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This should be a cinch for an expert angler like
you, Trainer! ...Right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can almost feel her pulling my strings like some
kind of puppeteer. But I'm her trainer, so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
